'''âj-f-s-n''' ('''kajafsenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubberize|rubberize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-f-s-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubberize|rubberize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-f-s-n
|-
! Lemma
| kajafsenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijafsenoko|thijafsenoko]] || [[word:jijafsenoko|jijafsenoko]] || [[word:shijafsenoko|shijafsenoko]] || [[word:kijafsenoko|kijafsenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujafsenoko|thuthujafsenoko]] || [[word:jujujafsenoko|jujujafsenoko]] || [[word:shushujafsenoko|shushujafsenoko]] || [[word:kukujafsenoko|kukujafsenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujafsenoko|thujafsenoko]] || [[word:jujafsenoko|jujafsenoko]] || [[word:shujafsenoko|shujafsenoko]] || [[word:kujafsenoko|kujafsenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojafsenoko|thojafsenoko]] || [[word:jojafsenoko|jojafsenoko]] || [[word:shojafsenoko|shojafsenoko]] || [[word:kojafsenoko|kojafsenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojafsenoko|thojafsenoko]] || [[word:jojafsenoko|jojafsenoko]] || [[word:shojafsenoko|shojafsenoko]] || [[word:kojafsenoko|kojafsenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjafsenoko|thĂŠjafsenoko]] || [[word:jĂŠjafsenoko|jĂŠjafsenoko]] || [[word:shĂŠjafsenoko|shĂŠjafsenoko]] || [[word:kĂŠjafsenoko|kĂŠjafsenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajafsenoko|thathajafsenoko]] || [[word:jajajafsenoko|jajajafsenoko]] || [[word:shashajafsenoko|shashajafsenoko]] || [[word:kakajafsenoko|kakajafsenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajafsenoko|thajafsenoko]] || [[word:jajafsenoko|jajafsenoko]] || [[word:shajafsenoko|shajafsenoko]] || [[word:kajafsenoko|kajafsenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajafsenoko|thajafsenoko]] || [[word:jajafsenoko|jajafsenoko]] || [[word:shajafsenoko|shajafsenoko]] || [[word:kajafsenoko|kajafsenoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
